ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully readable. Certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce / ICC.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, fully readable. Single page pro forma invoice.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The invoice number 'L010' does not constitute an LC reference — 'L' is a single letter prefix in the invoice number, not a bankterm label such as 'L/C', 'LC No.' or 'Letter of Credit'. No separate LC field or bankterm context exists in either document.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 — Exporter name/address block: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 531 40 Lidköping, Sweden'
Invoice page 1 — Footer: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 53140 LIDKÖPING'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' found in invoice exporter block and footer.
Consignee 'CHORI CO., LTD' found in invoice TO/Name field.
pairing_validation.reasoning: At least two of three pairing criteria are met: consignor and consignee are both identifiable in the invoice. Document pairing is valid.

candidates.normalized_text: life science dept. (sec. 0061), 1-7-3, awajimachi, chuo-ku osaka 540-8603, japan

checkpoints.certificate_value: Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, SE-531 40, LIDKÖPING, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 531 40 Lidköping, Sweden (exporter block) / Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 53140 LIDKÖPING (footer)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Name 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' explicitly found in invoice exporter declaration block and footer.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice exporter name.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB'. Invoice exporter: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB'. Exact match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Sweden from certificate against invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Country 'Sweden' explicitly stated in invoice exporter block. Additionally confirmed by VAT number prefix 'SE' in SE556000153801 and IBAN prefix 'SE' in SE89 1200 0000 0124 1011 2110.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: Sweden. Invoice country: Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Countries are identical.

rules_applied.description: Group structure — consignor name explicitly found in invoice exporter declaration block and footer.
Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' is explicitly found in the invoice as the exporter (with full name and address: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 531 40 Lidköping, Sweden') and also in the invoice footer ('Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 53140 LIDKÖPING'). The name is an exact match. Country 'Sweden' is explicitly stated in the exporter address block and confirmed by Swedish VAT prefix 'SE' and IBAN prefix 'SE'. Note: the invoice is addressed TO 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' (consignee), meaning Lantmännen Reppe AB is the issuer/seller, which aligns with their consignor role in the certificate. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert consignor: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' (Sweden). Invoice exporter block: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 531 40 Lidköping, Sweden'. Footer: 'Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 53140 LIDKÖPING'. VAT: SE556000153801. Exact name match. Country Sweden confirmed in multiple places. Rule 4.1.0 gives MATCH since consignor name is explicitly found in invoice.

checkpoints.certificate_value: CHORI CO., LTD, Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061), 1-7-3 Awajimachi, Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603, JAPAN
checkpoints.invoice_value: CHORI CO.,LTD., Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061), 1-7-3, Awajimachi, Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603, JAPAN

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing field in the invoice. The invoice TO/Name field contains 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' — this is the primary billing field.
comparison_steps.result: Primary billing field identified: 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' in TO/Name field.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee with invoice billing party.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'CHORI CO., LTD' → normalized 'chori co ltd'. Invoice: 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' → normalized 'chori co ltd'. Exact match after normalization (punctuation, spacing).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '1-7-3 Awajimachi'. Invoice: '1-7-3, Awajimachi'. Minor punctuation difference (comma after 1-7-3).
comparison_steps.result: Address details consistent. Department 'Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061)' present in both. City 'Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603' present in both.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: JAPAN. Invoice TO country: JAPAN.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Countries are identical.

rules_applied.description: Priority order — invoice TO/Name field used as primary billing field.
Name verification — exact match after normalization of punctuation and spacing.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate consignee 'CHORI CO., LTD' matches invoice TO/Name 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' exactly after normalization of punctuation (period, comma, spacing). Both include department 'Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061)' and address '1-7-3 Awajimachi, Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603'. Country Japan matches in both documents. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert consignee: 'CHORI CO., LTD' → normalized 'chori co ltd'. Invoice TO: 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' → normalized 'chori co ltd'. Difference is only in punctuation ('., ' vs '.,') and trailing period — permitted normalization. Full address match. Country Japan identical. Rule 4.2.0.2 confirms primary billing field. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in the certificate.
comparison_steps.result: No specific article numbers found in certificate. The certificate contains a batch-like identifier context but no article number field. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 — Priority 2: Controlled text matching — identify identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate goods description.
comparison_steps.result: Identity-bearing main designation: 'Reppal VWG'. This is the product brand name and code that uniquely identifies the product. '25 Kg Bags' is a packaging specification (non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4).

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 — Text matching of main designation against invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Reppal VWG' in invoice goods description.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Invoice states 'Reppal VWG (Vital wheat gluten)'. The exact string 'Reppal VWG' is present in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate adds '25 Kg Bags' (packaging info). Invoice adds '(Vital wheat gluten)' (product explanation). Neither changes product identity.
comparison_steps.result: Both are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4. Main designation 'Reppal VWG' confirmed in both documents. No mismatch.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'Reppal VWG' identified and found exactly in invoice.
Non-identity-bearing additions — '25 Kg Bags' (cert) and '(Vital wheat gluten)' (invoice) are additions that do not change product identity.

checkpoints.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Reppal VWG' from the certificate is found exactly in the invoice description 'Reppal VWG (Vital wheat gluten)'. The certificate's '25 Kg Bags' is a packaging specification and the invoice's '(Vital wheat gluten)' is a product explanation — both are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert goods: 'Reppal VWG 25 Kg Bags'. Invoice goods: 'Reppal VWG (Vital wheat gluten)'. Main designation: 'Reppal VWG' — exact string match in invoice. Certificate adds packaging '25 Kg Bags'. Invoice adds product description '(Vital wheat gluten)'. Per 4.3.4, neither addition changes product identity. No article numbers to verify. MATCH via Priority 2 (4.3.3).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because '25 Kg Bags' does not appear in invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.4, packaging specifications are non-identity-bearing additions. The main designation 'Reppal VWG' matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '20000 Kg'. Both numeric value (20000) and unit (Kg) are explicitly present.
comparison_steps.result: Requirement met. Numeric value: 20000. Unit: Kg.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains one quantity: '20000 Kg'. Box 6 mentions '20 Pallets' (packaging) and '25 Kg Bags' (bag specification). The verifiable quantity from box 7 is 20000 Kg.
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 value '20000 Kg' is the verification-grounding quantity.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 — Occurrence check: search for 20000 in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Invoice Quantity column shows '20 000,00'. After normalization of thousands separator (space) and removal of decimal part ',00', the numeric value is 20000.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Invoice numeric value 20000 matches certificate numeric value 20000.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice value '20 000,00' uses space as thousands separator and comma as decimal separator. After removing thousands separator and decimal: 20000. Certificate value: 20000.
comparison_steps.result: Values match after normalization. Thousands separator normalization is permitted since the value is essentially a whole number (decimal part is ,00).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '20000 Kg' without explicit GW/NW designation. This is a single weight value without category.
comparison_steps.result: Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate states one single weight value without category. Invoice value 20000 matches. Invoice does not contain a conflicting alternative weight value of different category. → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check — numeric value 20000 identified in invoice.
Thousands separator normalization — invoice '20 000,00' normalized to 20000.
Single weight value without GW/NW category — matched per point 2 (no conflicting alternative).

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 states '20000 Kg'. Invoice quantity column states '20 000,00'. After thousands separator normalization (space removed) and truncation of decimal ',00', the numeric value is 20000 — matching the certificate's value exactly. The certificate states a single weight value without GW/NW category. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, since the value matches and the invoice does not contain a conflicting alternative weight value, this is MATCH. Note: the invoice quantity column likely refers to product quantity in units (matching the weight in Kg from the certificate). MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert: '20000 Kg' (box 7). Invoice: '20 000,00' (Quantity column). Normalized: 20000 = 20000. Thousands separator normalization per 4.4.3.3 applied (space as separator). Decimal ',00' truncated. Certificate has single weight value without category — 4.4.2.2 point 2 applies since no conflicting alternative. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice quantity '20 000,00' might represent a different unit than Kg
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.3, verification concerns only the numeric value. The invoice need not state the same unit. The numeric value 20000 is identifiable in the invoice for the corresponding goods.

checkpoints.invoice_value: these products are of EU preferential origin. / Company: Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin declarations in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Invoice contains: 'these products are of EU preferential origin.' This is an explicit origin declaration. Additionally, the exporter address block states 'Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU Sweden'. Invoice states 'EU preferential origin'. 'EU' in certificate matches 'EU' in invoice origin declaration.
comparison_steps.result: EU origin verified — invoice explicitly declares 'EU preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU Sweden' — EU collective term combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice contains explicit EU origin statement ('these products are of EU preferential origin'). Checking conditions: (1) Certificate origin field has EU + one country (Sweden). (2) Invoice has explicit EU origin statement in a dedicated exporter/origin field. (3) Invoice contains no origin information contradicting EU origin.
comparison_steps.result: All conditions of 4.5.4.2.1 met. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 — Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Scan invoice for any non-EU origin declarations.
comparison_steps.result: No non-EU origin countries found in invoice. Only 'EU preferential origin' declared.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization — 'EU' in certificate verified against 'EU preferential origin' declaration in invoice.
EU [land] exception — certificate states 'EU Sweden', invoice confirms 'EU preferential origin'. Single EU member state combined with EU collective term → general EU statement in invoice suffices.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate origin box 3 states 'EU Sweden'. The invoice contains an explicit EU origin declaration: 'these products are of EU preferential origin.' Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when the certificate states 'EU [one member state]' and the invoice contains an explicit EU origin statement, this is MATCH. Sweden is an EU member state. The invoice exporter address also confirms Sweden. No non-EU origins are declared in the invoice. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Cert origin: 'EU Sweden'. Invoice origin declaration: 'these products are of EU preferential origin.' Rule 4.5.4.2.1 applies: cert has 'EU' + one EU member state (Sweden), invoice has explicit EU origin statement in dedicated exporter/origin field. All three conditions met: (1) EU + one country, (2) explicit EU origin statement present, (3) no contradicting origin info. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice does not explicitly state 'Sweden' as origin
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [one EU member state]', a general EU origin statement in the invoice suffices. The specific EU member state does not need separate confirmation when EU origin is confirmed.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE — No LC reference found in certificate. Invoice number 'L010' is not an LC reference.
Document A identified as certificate (single page). Document B identified as invoice (single page). Standard pairing.
PASS — Consignor 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' found in invoice. Consignee 'CHORI CO., LTD' found in invoice. Pairing valid.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure — consignor name search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' found in invoice exporter block and footer.
Sweden confirmed via explicit address, VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE.
Primary billing field identified: TO/Name field with 'CHORI CO.,LTD.'
MATCH — 'CHORI CO., LTD' normalized matches 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' normalized.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH — 'Reppal VWG' found exactly in invoice.
Applied — '25 Kg Bags' and '(Vital wheat gluten)' are non-identity-bearing.
MATCH — 20000 found in invoice after normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Weight category — single value without GW/NW
rule_evaluation_log.result: Point 2 applied — single value, no conflicting alternative → MATCH.
Applied — EU verified via 'EU preferential origin' declaration.
Applied — 'EU Sweden' verified via general EU origin statement in invoice. All conditions met.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter matchar. Avsändaren Lantmännen Reppe AB återfinns i fakturan som exportör med adress och momsregistreringsnummer i Sverige. Mottagaren CHORI CO., LTD i Japan stämmer överens. Varubeskrivningen Reppal VWG och kvantiteten 20 000 kg kan verifieras. Ursprungslandet EU Sweden bekräftas av fakturans ursprungsdeklaration om EU-preferensursprung.
overall_assessment.decision_reasoning: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH: (1) Consignor — Lantmännen Reppe AB found explicitly in invoice exporter block and footer with matching country Sweden. (2) Consignee — CHORI CO., LTD matches invoice TO field exactly with matching country Japan. (3) Goods — 'Reppal VWG' identified exactly in both documents. (4) Quantity — 20000 Kg matches invoice quantity 20 000,00 after normalization. (5) Origin — 'EU Sweden' verified via invoice's explicit 'EU preferential origin' declaration per rule 4.5.4.2.1. No mismatches, no manual review triggers. All confidence values ≥ 0.97, well above 0.85 threshold.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair: Certifikat SEG-23D-786929 (Lantmännen Reppe AB) mot Pro Forma Invoice L010

sections.certificate_value: Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, SE-531 40, LIDKÖPING, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 531 40 Lidköping, Sweden (exportör) / Lantmännen Reppe AB, Jungmansgatan 8, 53140 LIDKÖPING (sidfot)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur 4.1.0 — consignor-namn uttryckligen funnet i faktura. Namnverifiering 4.1.2 — exakt matchning. Landverifiering 4.1.2.1 — Sweden bekräftat via adress, VAT-prefix SE, IBAN-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Lantmännen Reppe AB' med adress i Lidköping, Sverige, återfinns explicit i fakturans exportörsblock och sidfot med identiskt företagsnamn, adress och land. Momsregistreringsnummer SE556000153801 bekräftar svenskt säte. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: CHORI CO., LTD, Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061), 1-7-3 Awajimachi, Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603, JAPAN
sections.invoice_value: CHORI CO.,LTD., Life Science Dept. (SEC. 0061), 1-7-3, Awajimachi, Chuo-ku Osaka 540-8603, JAPAN
sections.rule_applied: Primärt faktureringsfält 4.2.0.2 — TO/Name-fält identifierat. Namnverifiering 4.2.2 — exakt matchning efter normalisering av interpunktion. Landverifiering 4.2.3 — Japan matchar.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'CHORI CO., LTD' med adress i Osaka, Japan, matchar fakturans TO/Name-fält 'CHORI CO.,LTD.' exakt efter normalisering av interpunktion och mellanslag. Avdelningsangivelse, adress och postnummer stämmer. Land Japan matchar. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 20 Pallets, Reppal VWG 25 Kg Bags, From Lantmännen Reppe AB, Produced in Sweden with wheat from EU Region
sections.invoice_value: Reppal VWG (Vital wheat gluten), Batch: 2303010003, HS:Code - 1109 00 00
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning 4.3.3 — identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Reppal VWG' identifierad och funnen exakt i fakturan. Icke-identitetsbärande tillägg 4.3.4 — '25 Kg Bags' och '(Vital wheat gluten)' påverkar inte produktidentitet.
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Reppal VWG' i certifikatet återfinns exakt i fakturans beskrivning 'Reppal VWG (Vital wheat gluten)'. Certifikatets tillägg '25 Kg Bags' (förpackning) och fakturans tillägg '(Vital wheat gluten)' (produktförklaring) är icke-identitetsbärande. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll 4.4.1 — numeriskt värde 20000 identifierat i faktura. Tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering 4.4.3.3 — fakturans '20 000,00' normaliserat till 20000. Viktkategori 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 — enstaka viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori, inget motstridigt alternativ.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet '20000 Kg' (box 7) matchar fakturans kvantitet '20 000,00' efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag) och trunkering av decimaler (',00'). Certifikatet anger ett enda viktvärde utan GW/NW-kategori; fakturan anger ej motstridigt alternativt viktvärde. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: these products are of EU preferential origin.
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering 4.5.4.1 — 'EU' verifierat mot 'EU preferential origin'. EU [land]-undantag 4.5.4.2.1 — certifikat anger 'EU Sweden' (EU + ett EU-medlemsland), faktura har explicit EU-ursprungsuttalande. Alla villkor uppfyllda.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsfält anger 'EU Sweden'. Fakturan innehåller en explicit ursprungsdeklaration: 'these products are of EU preferential origin.' Enligt regel 4.5.4.2.1 är detta MATCH när certifikatet anger EU + ett EU-medlemsland och fakturan bekräftar EU-ursprung. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan. MATCH.

human_readable_report.final_conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) verifieras som MATCH. Certifikat SEG-23D-786929 kan verifieras mot den bifogade Pro Forma Invoice L010. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW. Consistency verified: all motivations align with status. Confidence floor (0.85) met for all applicable checkpoints.
